# Pick-a-tile End of Life Communication

> 🚧
>
> Our legacy 'Pick-A-Tile' CAPTCHA challenges are reaching their End of Life on October 8,2025. Any customers still using these puzzles will be migrated over to our latest MatchKey challenges after October 8, 2025.

## **Why Is This Change Happening?**

We're retiring the Pick-a-tile format for several important reasons:

### **Security Evolution**

* The threat landscape has evolved significantly since Pick-a-tile was first introduced. Modern automated attacks have become increasingly sophisticated, and the binary format of Pick-a-tile (with fixed "correct" and "incorrect" images) has become more vulnerable to these attacks.

### **Improved User Experience**

* Data from our tests shows that **Match-Key reduces user friction by approximately 50%** compared to Pick-a-tile. This means fewer frustrated users and fewer abandoned transactions on your site.

### **Accessibility Requirements**

* Recent updates to WCAG compliance standards make it challenging to maintain accessibility for the aging Pick-a-tile framework. Match-Key was built from the ground up with modern accessibility requirements in mind.

### **Resource Optimization**

* Maintaining parallel systems divides our engineering resources and slows down innovation. By focusing on a single, superior platform, we can deliver enhanced security features and improvements more rapidly.

## **What do I need to do?**

**Action Required:** Simply approve the change from Pick-a-tile to Match-Key

We'll handle the entire technical implementation for you. The process is simple:

### **Step 1: Review the Change Proposal**

* Review the Match-Key benefits information we've provided
* Note the timeline for the transition

### **Step 2: Provide Your Approval**

* Respond to your account manager with your approval
* Choose your preferred migration date (anytime before October 8, 2025)

### **Step 3: We Handle the Rest**

* Our technical team will schedule and perform the migration
* We'll conduct thorough testing to ensure everything works correctly
* We'll notify you when the change is complete

**That's it!** No technical implementation is required on your end. We manage the entire process to ensure a seamless transition.

## **Recommended Timeline**

| Date                   | Milestone                                                                          |
| :--------------------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **May - July 2025**    | Recommended window to approve your migration                                       |
| **July - August 2025** | We'll run tests on your keys to ensure compatibility                               |
| **September 2025**     | Gradual transition period and final cut-over                                       |
| **October 8, 2025**    | **FULL DEPRECATION** - All Pick-a-tile traffic automatically switched to Match-Key |

## **What will be the impact for our users and our company?**

### **Impact on Your Users**

* **Improved Experience:** Users will encounter fewer failures (7% vs 14% with Pick-a-tile)
* **Better Accessibility:** Match-Key is fully WCAG2 compliant, making your service more accessible to all users
* **Clearer Visual Challenges:** High-resolution images make verification tasks easier to understand
* **Better Guidance:** Enhanced instruction system helps users complete verification faster
* **No Service Disruption:** The transition will be seamless with no downtime

### **What happens if we do not upgrade before October 8, 2025?**

* On October 8, 2025, any traffic still receiving the Pick-a-tile puzzle will automatically start receiving a Match-Key puzzle instead. We will handle all the necessary changes on our end to upgrade your Keys to Match-Key challenges.
* While we will ensure this automatic transition works, we strongly recommend scheduling your upgrade before the deadline. This allows for a more controlled transition and gives you the opportunity to familiarize yourself with the new format's improved performance metrics.

## **Who do I talk to if I have any questions?**

Please reach out to your CSM if you have any questions.
